metadata.title: 2019 Super Duty Chassis Cab BBAS Guide

reasoning_log.note: Highest-value Tier A hunt target for exact-vehicle front axle/frame mounts on 2019 F-450 Chassis Cab 145.3/60. RC is hunt priority only — bytes absent; no VERIFIED_EVIDENCE.

notes: Prioritized for LANE_A_DOC acquisition. SPECIFICATION_READY / PDF URL indexed claims from the operator sprint are rejected until local bytes + sha256 + page cites exist. Do not mark VERIFIED_EVIDENCE or SPECIFICATION_READY from URL indexing alone.
configuration_applicability_claim: Claimed in operator sprint to cover F-250 through F-550 Chassis Cab including 145.3 WB / 60 CA. Not verified against local PDF bytes in this sprint.
